channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Audit Reports Highlight Municipal Governance Failures and Calls for Accountability
item.description: The article discusses the findings of South Africa's Auditor-General, Tsakani Maluleke, in her 2024-2025 audit report, which reveals significant shortcomings in municipal governance. Only 15% of munic...

item.title: PNP deploys over 6,000 police officers as Senate prepares for Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The Philippine National Police–National Capital Region Police Office (PNP-NCRPO) announced that more than 6,000 police officers will be deployed around the Senate on July 6 to maintain peace and order...

item.title: Pakistan military honors Karnal Sher Khan on 27th martyrdom anniversary
item.description: The Pakistan military paid tribute to Captain Karnal Sher Khan Shaheed, a celebrated hero of the 1999 Kargil conflict, on the 27th anniversary of his martyrdom. The Inter-Service Public Relations (ISP...

item.title: Young Man with Severe Epilepsy Faces Family Struggles
item.description: Victor Kipyego, an 18-year-old from Yala Village in Chepkumia Ward, suffers from severe epilepsy that has left him completely immobile and requires round-the-clock care. His mother, Caroline Jelagat, ...

item.title: Ezra Klein argues Obama's contrast to Trump could shape future elections
item.description: In a column published on July 5, 2026, Ezra Klein, a New York Times columnist, argues that Barack Obama remains the only viable candidate capable of challenging Donald Trump's political dominance. Kle...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with technical access issues
item.description: The article explains that News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. Users experiencing access restrictions are advised to temporarily disable ad block...

item.title: Cape Town City secures experienced midfielder Thabang Monare for 2026/27 season
item.description: Cape Town City has bolstered their squad with the signing of 36-year-old former Bafana Bafana and Orlando Pirates midfielder Thabang Monare. The veteran player, who earned 10 national team caps, joins...

item.title: Low Sockeye Returns in Okanagan Waters Due to Warm Rivers and Climate Concerns
item.description: The Syilx Okanagan Nation Alliance has warned that Okanagan sockeye salmon returns are expected to remain low for the second consecutive year due to persistently warm water temperatures and reduced st...

item.title: Cheslin Kolbe's 50th Bok Cap: Reflections on Overcoming Challenges in Rugby
item.description: Springbok wing Cheslin Kolbe celebrated his 50th Test cap with a standout performance against England, scoring a try and contributing crucial points via his boot. Reflecting on his journey, Kolbe ackn...

item.title: Court Overturns 2022 Ruling Allowing Muslim Girls to Wear Hijab at UI International School
item.description: The Court of Appeal has overturned a 2022 judgment that allowed Muslim girls to wear hijabs as part of their school uniform at the International School, University of Ibadan (ISI). The appellate court...

item.title: Debating Gun Control After Montreal Shootings: A Call for Targeted Solutions
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing debate over gun control in Canada following a tragic shooting in Montreal. It critiques the tendency of politicians to call for stricter gun laws after each incident,...

item.title: Tricycle and SUV Collision Leaves 3 Dead, 3 Injured in Sarangani
item.description: A fatal collision between a tricycle and an SUV occurred on the General Santos City-Digos Highway in Sarangani province, resulting in three immediate deaths and three critical injuries. The incident, ...

item.title: Jaiye Kuti Speaks Out On Lack Of Support In Nigerian Film Industry
item.description: Nollywood actress Jaiye Kuti has opened up about the growing lack of solidarity within the Nigerian film industry, criticizing how many actors and filmmakers avoid supporting each other during tough t...

item.title: The Kivin Method: Enhancing Oral Sex Through a Sideways Technique
item.description: The article discusses the Kivin method, an oral sex technique that involves a perpendicular position where the giver lies across the receiver's body, aligning their lips side-to-side. This method focu...

item.title: Poland Revokes Honor Awarded to Zelensky Over UPA Designation
item.description: Poland's President Karol Nawrocki revoked the Order of the White Eagle, the nation's highest honor, from former Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky on June 19, 2026. This decision followed Zelensky...

item.title: The Rolling Stones commemorate Amy Winehouse's legacy through new album and reflections
item.description: The Rolling Stones have shared heartfelt reflections on the passing of Amy Winehouse, acknowledging her profound impact on their music and legacy. Ahead of releasing their 25th studio album, 'Foreign ...

item.title: Beach Towns Restrict Large Canopies for Safety and Visibility
item.description: Beach towns in Southern California, including Newport Beach and Laguna Beach, are implementing stricter regulations on large shade structures like canopies due to safety concerns. Officials cite issue...

item.title: Paraguay's World Cup exit after 1-0 loss to France, coach praises team's effort
item.description: Paraguay's coach Gustavo Alfaro claimed his team 'fought like lions' despite their 1-0 World Cup defeat to France in the last-16 tie. The match, held at Lincoln Financial Field in Philadelphia, saw Ky...

item.title: Motorcycle Fire Causes Significant Damage to Spare Parts Shops in Wazimwa
item.description: A motorcycle fire incident in Wazimwa has caused extensive damage to multiple spare parts shops, prompting local authorities to investigate the cause. The blaze started when a motorcycle ignited and r...

item.title: St Kilda's dominant performance over Essendon
item.description: Nasiah Wanganeen-Milera delivered a standout performance with a career-best 46 disposals, leading St Kilda to a commanding 67-point victory over Essendon at Marvel Stadium. The Saints' dominant first ...
